node.title: Uber | Phone | Sticks & Maximum number of overlapping Intervals

topic.title: Uber | Phone | Sticks & Maximum number of overlapping Intervals

post.content:
**Q1**: Given array of stick lengths, return number of turns it  takes to have no sticks left. Each turn you remove sticks of smallest length and cut that length from the rest of the sticks.


**Q2**: In a 2D vector, all vectors were of size two. Eg: {{1,3},{2,3},{1,4}}. The vectors represent the entry and exit time of a pedestrian crossing a road. Pedestrian 1 entered at time 1 and exited at time 3 and so on.. Find the interval during which maximum number of pedestrians were crossing the road.  

If you've seen this question before in leetcode, please feel free to reply.

Q2 : 

1. Maintain a startList (startimes)
2. Maintain a endList (all end times)
3. Sort both startList and endList
4. Keep two pointers i and j pointing to beginning of startList and endList resply
   -> Keep a variable count to track max number of passengers, 
    -> if startList(i) < endList(j), increment count
    -> if startList(i) > endList(j), decrement count
    -> Now , track maxCount and resultInterval (i.j) and keep updating as you go...

return resultInterval.
Which location?\nhow much exp you have?
